title: Foster Agent
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Image}}
A '''Foster Agent''' was a type of undercover operative working for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Their mission was to collect Rebels who were stranded or in danger of being captured by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] security and intelligence forces, and arrange for their safe passage back to the Alliance. Rebel [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Rebel pilot/Legends|pilots]] would be given the names of Foster Agents operating in the area, giving them a ground-based contact in case they were forced to bail out. [[Alliance Special Operations/Legends|SpecOps teams]] and other operatives had similar arrangements in case their transportation was lost or their cover was blown.<ref name="Galaxy Guide 9">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''</ref>

This was generally considered the most dangerous position within the Rebel Alliance. This was because so many Rebels would be given the names of Foster Agents: if even one was captured and interrogated, they could expose the Foster Agent to the Empire. The Foster Agent could then be caught by the Empire through no fault of his or her own.<ref name="Galaxy Guide 9" />

==Notable Foster Agents==
*[[Ytavarg Aleema]]<ref name="CRO">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]''</ref>
